petoskey.site: Petoskey Pit civic bowl (Scenario E, in-situ package)
petoskey.crs: EPSG:6494 NAD83(2011) Michigan Central, intl ft; NAVD88 ft

dem.value: 2015 USGS LiDAR (MI 13County C16) + 2026 supplement, design rasters at 1 ft

capacity.note: nominal Scenario E baseline; 1,243 Band-A validated; options to 1,505 validated

audience_facing_az_deg.note: seating axis az 132 -> nominal facing 312; bay-view corridor az 330

stage_frontage_ft.note: 70x34 ft low stage core + lateral shoulders; PROVISIONAL (Rule 9 OPEN)

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: event floor between stage and row 1

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> row 18: 35 ft floor + seating depth (rN - r1 radii)

row_count_est.note: formal rows 1-18 minus promenade 5 + aisle 9/10 = 15 treads x 3 sections

ada.value: two 8.33% switchback routes + level cross-aisle (rows 9/10) at 622.01; validated

backdrop.value: open to Little Traverse Bay az 330; no upstage wall (landscape venue)

santa_barbara_bowl.location: 1122 N Milpas St, Santa Barbara, CA
santa_barbara_bowl.crs: EPSG:26911 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x25y382 CA Montecito (1.0 m)

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: deck west-edge span read from hillshade/imagery; OSM house long dim 125 ft is the upper bound incl. wings

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: performance deck depth unknown; OSM house short dim 79 ft includes backstage; 2002 rebuild total 10,000 sqft stage+backstage bounds it

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure + hillshade ring reads; row1 = first riser, seating_top = upper concourse bench at ~248 ft elev

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 140 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 43.4 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 212.3 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.value: ~30-40 bench rows in 3 banks (A-C / D-I / J-O)
row_count_est.note: inferred: imagery terrace texture + published section bands; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual ~1 ft risers

ada.value: main cross-aisle visible ~ring 30 m + concourse at top of bowl; ADA platform added 2003 (published); switchback access roads N and S of bowl

backdrop.value: audience faces ~E into canyon hillside (oak woodland) behind stage house; enclosed canyon venue with tall stage house + roof

meijer_gardens_amphitheater.location: 1000 E Beltline Ave NE, Grand Rapids, MI
meijer_gardens_amphitheater.crs: EPSG:26916 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x61y476 MI 31Co Kent 2016 (1.0 m)

capacity.source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frederik_Meijer_Gardens (tiered lawn seating for 1,900; flagged citation-needed there, but the 1,900 figure is used venue-wide in press)

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: lens-canopy chord facing audience from OSM footprint (long dim 110 ft); deck edge slightly inside canopy

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: OSM canopy short dim 54 ft; deck inset

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure; row1 = first terrace seat-wall, top = lawn crest before promenade

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 100 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 31.2 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 96.1 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.note: inferred: hillshade/imagery arc count ring 8-38 m; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual seat walls

ada.value: level entry plaza at stage sides; flanking paths both sides of lawn; cross path mid-bowl ~ring 35 m (imagery)

backdrop.value: audience faces ~NNE across stage to pond + sculpture-park woodland; low covered stage, open landscape backdrop
